title: ghost stories in Shadow Trackers Indigenous Australia ghost stories
publication_or_organisation: Shadow Trackers: the spooky stories of Aboriginal Australia; ABC Life Matters
australian_relation: ABC Life Matters public interview about Shadow Trackers and real-life ghost stories of Indigenous Australia.
evidence_summary: ABC Life Matters described the Australian documentary Shadow Trackers as following two adventurers who go in search of real-life ghost stories of Indigenous Australia and tell listeners what they saw.
